member.name: T:Chummer.Media.Contracts.Assets.AssetApprovalStatus
member.summary: Approval result for a rendered asset after factory-side review state is persisted.

member.name: F:Chummer.Media.Contracts.Assets.AssetApprovalStatus.Pending
member.summary: Awaiting a factory-side review decision.

member.name: F:Chummer.Media.Contracts.Assets.AssetApprovalStatus.Approved
member.summary: Accepted for persisted/canonical downstream usage.

member.name: F:Chummer.Media.Contracts.Assets.AssetApprovalStatus.Rejected
member.summary: Explicitly declined during review.

member.name: T:Chummer.Media.Contracts.Assets.MediaAssetCatalogEntry
member.summary: Catalog-facing asset metadata used to index manifests without taking ownership of delivery policy.

member.name: M:Chummer.Media.Contracts.Assets.MediaAssetCatalogEntry.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset})
member.summary: Catalog-facing asset metadata used to index manifests without taking ownership of delivery policy.

member.name: T:Chummer.Media.Contracts.Assets.MediaAssetLifecycleState
member.summary: Asset lifecycle state owned by media-factory, including approval and persistence checkpoints.
Asset lifecycle state owned by media-factory, including approval and persistence checkpoints.

member.name: T:Chummer.Media.Contracts.Assets.MediaAssetManifest
member.summary: Canonical manifest for a rendered asset, including storage, previews, retention, and lineage metadata.
Canonical manifest for a rendered asset, including storage, previews, retention, and lineage metadata.

member.name: T:Chummer.Media.Contracts.ContractsAssemblyMarker
member.summary: Marker type for the canonical render-only contracts assembly. Narrative authoring, routing, approvals policy, delivery, and orchestration stay upstream.

member.name: T:Chummer.Media.Contracts.Jobs.RenderJobContract
member.summary: Queue-owned job envelope for deterministic render execution and dedupe tracking.
Queue-owned job envelope for deterministic render execution and dedupe tracking.

member.name: T:Chummer.Media.Contracts.Jobs.RenderJobDedupeScope
member.summary: Defines the ownership boundary for dedupe decisions within the factory job queue.

member.name: F:Chummer.Media.Contracts.Jobs.RenderJobDedupeScope.Request
member.summary: Dedupe by the exact render request payload.

member.name: F:Chummer.Media.Contracts.Jobs.RenderJobDedupeScope.TemplateVersion
member.summary: Dedupe within a template/version lineage.

member.name: F:Chummer.Media.Contracts.Jobs.RenderJobDedupeScope.OutputAsset
member.summary: Dedupe by intended output asset identity.

member.name: T:Chummer.Media.Contracts.Jobs.RenderJobStatus
member.summary: Lifecycle states for render job execution.

member.name: F:Chummer.Media.Contracts.Jobs.RenderJobStatus.Queued
member.summary: Accepted by the queue and waiting for claim.

member.name: F:Chummer.Media.Contracts.Jobs.RenderJobStatus.Claimed
member.summary: Claimed by a worker but not yet rendering.

member.name: F:Chummer.Media.Contracts.Jobs.RenderJobStatus.Rendering
member.summary: Actively executing a render attempt.

member.name: F:Chummer.Media.Contracts.Jobs.RenderJobStatus.Succeeded
member.summary: Completed successfully and emitted output artifacts.

member.name: F:Chummer.Media.Contracts.Jobs.RenderJobStatus.Failed
member.summary: Completed with failure after an attempt.

member.name: F:Chummer.Media.Contracts.Jobs.RenderJobStatus.Cancelled
member.summary: Stopped by caller/system cancellation.

member.summary: Contract for creating a new immutable manifest with initial lifecycle state.
